title: Don't segfault if an image layer has no creation timestamp
body:
It's optional in the specification, and I initially omitted
it in the ostree code.  Now I've fixed the ostree code
to inject a timestamp, but we should clearly avoid segfaulting
on this case.

comments.body:
xref https://github.com/ostreedev/ostree-rs-ext/issues/211

Also sorry for no test case yet; podman's test suite is gigantic and this is just a drive by, hopefully obviously correct patch.  But if someone tells me where a test should go I can try.

@cgwalters you need to sign your commits here.
@jwhonce WDYT?  Got pointers for the test or do you want to grab and run with this?
OK fine, actually writing a unit test for this was pretty easy.  I did verify that the unit test fails (panics) without the patch.
